text:
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/bsdinstall/#bsdinstall-pre
Specifically, section 2.3.1.1.

There appears to be missing text at the end of two sentences:

1:
"Some operating systems might require this command to be run with ."

2:
"To force all writes to complete, use ."

In both cases, there appears to be missing text before the period.
AFAICT, there's no HTML magic going on; examining page source shows the text as above.
